entries.label: Are there generators present on the site?

Please verify Generator Run Logs are present onsite.  We are required to take a photo as evidence of the Generator Run Logs onsite.  The Generator Run Log should be maintained onsite in a red box affixed on the interior of the generator cabinet.
Are the generator run logs maintained onsite for inspectors review?
IMPORTANT: If logs are NOT available for review, please be sure to document this on the Other Findings screen.
